description: T-S K5, 16-40. Exercises of children, representing leters in various combinations and copies of the beginnings of the third and the first books of Moses. (Information from Goitein's note cards) Recto: Children's writing exercise, consisting of the alphabet with the various Tiberian vowels. Verso: Inexpertly written copy of the beginning of a letter, blessing a dignitary. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: תרגיל כתיבת ילד: אלפבית עם ניקוד טברני; גב: העתקה לא מיומנת של תחילת מכתב לדיגניטר
